title: Salesforce AppExchange Apps Scraper & Market Intelligence Dataset
description: Structured app dataset plus market intelligence reports exported to the default dataset and default key-value store.

dataset_items.title: Apps dataset items
dataset_items.description: Structured Salesforce AppExchange app records stored in the default dataset.

kv_store_keys.title: Output files in default key-value store
kv_store_keys.description: List of generated CSV, XLSX, JSON, TXT, and PDF outputs.

apps_csv.title: APPS.csv
apps_csv.description: Flat CSV export of discovered and enriched Salesforce AppExchange apps.

apps_xlsx.title: APPS.xlsx
apps_xlsx.description: Excel export of discovered and enriched Salesforce AppExchange apps.

market_intelligence_json.title: MARKET_INTELLIGENCE.json
market_intelligence_json.description: Structured market intelligence analysis including overview, competition, pricing, opportunities, and recommendations.

executive_summary_txt.title: EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY.txt
executive_summary_txt.description: Readable executive summary of the analyzed AppExchange market slice.

llm_market_summary_json.title: LLM_MARKET_SUMMARY.json
llm_market_summary_json.description: LLM-ready structured market summary for downstream AI or RAG workflows.

market_report_pdf.title: MARKET_REPORT.pdf
market_report_pdf.description: PDF market report with summary insights, opportunity signals, and market structure highlights.
